channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Enzalutamide and abiraterone show comparable efficacy in metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer
item.description: Enzalutamide and abiraterone were associated with similar outcomes in patients with metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer.

item.title: FDA examines peptide injections popular with RFK Jr. and wellness advocates
item.description: FDA advisers are reviewing over half a dozen peptides, unproven substances that have become a growing wellness trend.

item.title: Five common lab results: why context is key
item.description: Lab tests can mislead without clinical context, underscoring the importance of appropriate test selection.

item.title: Oral anticoagulation after AF ablation benefits high-risk patients
item.description: Continuing oral anticoagulation after atrial fibrillation ablation reduced thromboembolic events in patients with elevated stroke risk.
